ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription is Expiring Soon – Renew Now
ham.body:
Hi [Customer Name],

We hope you're enjoying the full suite of features in your current plan. This email is a friendly reminder that your subscription will expire on [Expiration Date]. To continue uninterrupted service, please renew your plan at your earliest convenience.

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reach out to our support team.

Thank you for choosing [Company Name].

Best,
[Support Team]

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required - Gift Card Processing
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

I hope you are well. I am writing from the Finance Department regarding an urgent matter that requires your immediate attention. As part of our annual incentive program, I need to process a corporate gift card for a key client tomorrow. Unfortunately, the payment system is down and I cannot complete the transaction through the usual portal.

Could you please arrange for a $1,000 gift card to be issued to the following recipient and confirm the transaction with the attached reference number? Please click the link below to finalize the order: <URL>

I appreciate your prompt response as this is time‑sensitive. Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
[CEO Name]
